nodes.name: Query raw_market_data for Reference
nodes.query: SELECT * FROM raw_market_data WHERE timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Calculate Reference Score
Insert to reference_scores
nodes.query: INSERT INTO reference_scores (components_breadth_score, components_risk_score, technical_rsi_score, technical_atr_score, technical_zscore_score, technical_macd_score, technical_divergence_score, money_flow_futures_score, money_flow_etf_score, final_reference_score, timestamp) VALUES (${msg.payload.components_breadth_score}, ${msg.payload.components_risk_score}, ${msg.payload.technical_rsi_score}, ${msg.payload.technical_atr_score}, ${msg.payload.technical_zscore_score}, ${msg.payload.technical_macd_score}, ${msg.payload.technical_divergence_score}, ${msg.payload.money_flow_futures_score}, ${msg.payload.money_flow_etf_score}, ${msg.payload.final_reference_score}, '${msg.payload.timestamp}')

metadata.description: Flow 8: Reference Score Calculation - calculates weighted reference score from market data
